messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.

`clang-tidy` is a tool that is part of the Clang project (a C/C++ compiler) and is used for static analysis of C and C++ code. It helps developers to find bugs and improve the code quality by suggesting fixes for specific coding style guidelines, potential bugs, or performance issues. By running `clang-tidy` on your codebase, you can enforce coding standards and catch potential issues early in the development process.
